'''Hunter Of Winds''' was the father of [[Child Of Winds]]. This elder [[Qom Jha and Qom Qae|Qom Qae]] decided that contacting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] for help against the [[Chiss/Legends|Threateners]] was too risky, an act that the [[Eater Of Fire Creepers]] disagreed with and called Skywalker himself. When Luke finally arrived on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]], Hunter of Winds opposed [[Mission to Nirauan|assisting]] Skywalker and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] to reach the [[Hand of Thrawn]].

{{Char-stub}}
